pages.text: ┌─────────────┐ │  BUILDING   │ ← Initial state (setup) └──────┬──────┘        │ Right-click (empty hand / non-wrench)        ▼ ┌─────────────┐ │ SIMULATING  │ ← Measuring rates (chunks LOADED) └──────┬──────┘        │ Right-click (empty hand / non-wrench)        ▼ ┌─────────────┐ │   CACHED    │ ← Virtual production (chunks UNLOADED) └──────┬──────┘        │ Input starved or output blocked        ▼ ┌─────────────┐ │   HALTED    │ ← Input/Output Problem detected (chunks stay UNLOADED) └──────┬──────┘        │ Fix issue        └─────→ Back to CACHED
